release.scope: Public website preview; project deliverables and licenses are configured separately

annotations.scope: Reviewed temporal action phases for the public excerpt; not a complete training annotation set

temporal_segments.label: Grasp and rotate the first vessel under running water
Release, reach, and transition to the second object
Grasp, rotate, and inspect the plate

qa.label: Technical integrity
qa.basis: Complete 10-second H.264 decode at 960 × 540 and 24 FPS

qa.label: Visual selection
qa.basis: Selected from 21 candidates across 11 task families after time-separated visual review

qa.label: Media sanitization
qa.basis: Excerpt trimmed, muted, stripped of source metadata, transcoded, and renamed

qa.label: Public publication
qa.basis: Public marketing, buyer-distribution, legal, and privacy approval confirmed on 2026-07-12

known_limitations: The public excerpt contains RGB video only; no IMU, depth, gaze, or audio stream is published.
The temporal phases are illustrative reviewed events, not a complete training ontology or frame-level annotation release.
Public-preview approval does not grant model-training or redistribution rights.
